E_FORGED_REAL_SCORE.description: score_class=real_model without a present real adapter

E_HOLDOUT_SHA_MISMATCH.description: holdout bytes do not match D-127 pin sha256

E_B7_DIGEST_MISMATCH.description: B7 assembled/compat/id-set digests do not match candidate

E_THRESHOLD_REINVENT.description: second threshold set embedded; only V1 subject.four_layer_thresholds allowed

E_UNKNOWN_BEHAVIOR_CLASS.description: behavior class outside V1 five-class set

E_MISSING_CASE.description: case_id missing from one or more arms

E_MISSING_ARM.description: required arm absent under real mode

E_RESUME_SUBJECT_DRIFT.description: partial receipt subject does not match manifest subject

E_PACKAGE_DONE_CLAIM.description: harness claimed B2/B3/B4 DONE or C6 acceptance

E_SCHEMA.description: required field or type validation failure

E_SYNTHETIC_SCORE_IN_REAL.description: mode=real forbids score_class=synthetic on any required arm

E_FORCE_STATUS_REJECTED.description: force_status override is rejected under mode=real; all gates still run

E_REAL_ARTIFACT_DIGEST.description: mode=real requires present arm artifact.sha256 digest (64 hex)

E_HOLDOUT_THREE_WAY_MISMATCH.description: holdout pin, subject declaration, and loaded artifact sha256/row_count disagree

E_CASESET_INCOMPLETE.description: case set empty, truncated, duplicated, or not the authoritative 61-id set required for mode; receipt expected_case_ids is assertion-only vs D-127 holdout

E_V1_FORMULA_DRIFT.description: demo_fuzz threshold formula is not the canonical 5*pass >= 4*eligible

E_RESULT_PROVENANCE_MISMATCH.description: arm result score_class/artifact/scorer/mode does not bind to manifest arm descriptor

E_THRESHOLD_INCOMPLETE.description: V1 four_layer_thresholds missing/extra/malformed; never synthesize defaults for absent layers

E_S9B_STATUS_NOT_PASS.description: REAL S10 requires s9b.status==PASS; BLOCKED/NOT_RUN/UNKNOWN/missing/other fail closed

E_BINDING_MISSING.description: required subject/manifest binding field missing before evaluation (B7 digests, holdout, V1, mode, scorer)
